headline: Micron Stock Redefined Its Future, But the Market Isn't Convinced Yet
summary: Management laid out a stunning new growth plan with numbers that would make most companies blush, yet investors are offering little more than polite applause. Here's what they're waiting for.

headline: 1 High-Flying Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question
summary: Expensive stocks typically earn their valuations through superior growth rates that other companies simply can’t match. The flip side though is that these lofty expectations make them particularly susceptible to drawdowns when market sentiment shifts.

headline: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.
